title: LoraProfileResponse
description: JSON envelope returned by lora_db_profile_json. PROFILE EXECUTES THE QUERY FOR REAL: mutating queries (CREATE / MERGE / SET / DELETE / REMOVE) produce the same side effects as lora_db_execute_json. Use lora_db_explain_json to inspect a mutating plan without running it.

plan.description: Same shape as the response of lora_db_explain_json.

totalElapsedNs.description: Wall-clock time (in nanoseconds) spent inside the executor for this query.

totalRows.description: Number of rows produced before result-format projection.

mutated.description: Whether at least one mutating operator ran.

perOperator.description: Per-operator metrics keyed by physical node id (string-encoded). Keys match the `id` field of nodes in the plan tree.

dbHits.description: Reserved for a future phase. 0 today.

elapsedNs.description: Wall-clock time spent inside this operator's next_row, INCLUSIVE of descendants.

nextCalls.description: Total invocations of this operator's next_row.
